spec_match.rationale: Removal feature — page covers one slice (probe / migration / note) but the spec's full removal+replacement story is split across multiple concepts; this page can't carry it alone.

interactive.rationale: 3 buttons / 0 inputs / 0 selects / 0 ranges driving live JS — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates the feature-index blurb's key promise (overlap on attribution, back, first, measurement).

edge_cases.rationale: Some fallback / error handling is present but corner cases like removed-element behaviour, denied permission flow, or no-support browsers aren't all covered.

references.rationale: Page includes the chromestatus.com/feature/6320639375966208 link in the see-also section.

design_system.rationale: All colours come from the shared CSS variables and the layout follows the stage + controls editorial pattern.

openQuestions.title: Cover the spec aspect: concrete timeline and behaviour after removal
openQuestions.detail: The deprecate-and-remove-attribution-reporting-api feature's headline framing — Attribution Reporting API removal — explain migration to third-party-cookie measurement — calls out "concrete timeline and behaviour after removal". This concept page does not exercise that, so the spec story is incomplete from this page alone. Either extend this demo or land a sibling concept dedicated to it.

openQuestions.title: Cover the spec aspect: what replaces source/trigger registration
openQuestions.detail: The deprecate-and-remove-attribution-reporting-api feature's headline framing — Attribution Reporting API removal — explain migration to third-party-cookie measurement — calls out "what replaces source/trigger registration". This concept page does not exercise that, so the spec story is incomplete from this page alone. Either extend this demo or land a sibling concept dedicated to it.

openQuestions.title: Cover at least one realistic failure mode
openQuestions.detail: Add feature detection at the top of the script and surface the result. Handle the permission-denied / API-rejection case in the catch branch with a visible message. If the feature is flag-gated or origin-trial, show explicitly what the page does when the API is absent.

summary: attribution-removal under deprecate-and-remove-attribution-reporting-api: 4 pass / 2 partial / 0 fail. Strong interactive surface, design system clean, spec story is partial — see open questions for the angles still missing.
